name: @borjie/sae-probe
description: Sparse Autoencoder runtime probe (Wave 18BB-gap, research-grade stub). Runs a feature dictionary forward over hidden activations to surface interpretable feature firings (deception, hallucination, bias, sycophancy, prompt_injection, self_reference, confidentiality_leak). Companion: Docs/DESIGN/CALIBRATION_INTERPRETABILITY_SPEC.md §4. Phase 2 will train real SAEs; this package lays the runtime contract + storage so trained dictionaries plug in without re-architecture.
